title: Step Into Silly Shoe Style!
story: People across the country are deliberately mismatching their footwear on May 3 for National Two Different Colored Shoes Day! This wonderfully wacky holiday encourages everyone to throw fashion rules out the window and wear two completely different colored shoes. Kids love pairing their bright red sneaker with a blue boot, while adults might sport a black dress shoe with a white tennis shoe. Schools often join the fun by declaring it a special dress-up day. Social media fills with photos of creative shoe combinations, from polka dots paired with stripes to glittery heels matched with hiking boots. It's a simple way to celebrate being unique and embracing your quirky side!
activity_question: What do people do to celebrate National Two Different Colored Shoes Day?
activity_choices: Wear two completely different colored shoes
activity_answer: Wear two completely different colored shoes
follow_up_question: What's the most creative shoe combination you could imagine wearing?

title: Paws-itively Amazing Pet Heroes Day
story: Dogs with three legs, cats who are blind, and rabbits in wheelchairs get extra love on May 3 during National Specially-abled Pets Day! This special day celebrates pets who might be missing a limb, can't see or hear, or need help getting around, but are still incredible companions. People share photos and videos of their amazing pets online, showing how these furry friends play, cuddle, and bring joy just like any other pet. Veterinarians often host adoption events to help specially-abled animals find loving homes. Many pet owners use this day to spread the message that different doesn't mean less loveable!
activity_question: What do people often share online during National Specially-abled Pets Day?
activity_choices: Photos and videos of their amazing pets
Maps to the nearest pet store
activity_answer: Photos and videos of their amazing pets
follow_up_question: What special qualities make pets with disabilities such wonderful companions?

title: Zen and the Art of Garden Gazing
story: People across the country step into gardens on May 3 to find their inner peace during National Garden Meditation Day. Some sit quietly among flowers, others walk slowly through vegetable patches, and many simply breathe deeply while surrounded by green plants. Gardens become outdoor meditation studios where anyone can relax and feel calm.
activity_question: What do people do in gardens during this special day?
follow_up_question: What sounds or smells in a garden help you feel most relaxed?

title: National Lumpy Rug Day Gets Bumpy
story: Every May 3, people celebrate National Lumpy Rug Day by checking under their rugs for mysterious bumps and lumps! Some families make it a fun game, searching for lost toys, coins, or even pet treats hiding beneath their carpets.
activity_question: What do people look for under their rugs on National Lumpy Rug Day?
follow_up_question: What's the weirdest thing you've ever found under a rug or carpet?

title: Sun Day: Solar Power Fun!
story: Every May 3, people celebrate Sun Day by learning about solar energy and how sunshine can power our world! Families visit science museums to see solar panels in action, while schools host fun experiments showing how the sun can cook food or charge batteries. Many communities organize outdoor festivals where kids can build solar ovens from pizza boxes and watch them heat up marshmallows using only sunlight. Environmental groups use this day to teach everyone about clean energy and why the sun is such an amazing, free power source. Some people even pledge to use more solar energy in their homes!
activity_question: What do kids often build on Sun Day to cook food using solar energy?
bonus_fact: The sun provides more energy to Earth in one hour than the whole world uses in a year!

title: Popover Power: Raspberry Edition!
story: Fluffy, golden popovers stuffed with juicy raspberries take center stage every May 3 on National Raspberry Popover Day! These amazing pastries puff up like magic in the oven, creating hollow pockets perfect for sweet raspberry filling. Bakeries across the country whip up special raspberry popover treats, while home bakers try their hand at making these tricky but delicious goodies. The secret is super hot ovens that make the batter rise into crispy, airy shells that practically burst with berry goodness!
activity_question: What makes popovers puff up into their special shape?
bonus_fact: Popovers can grow to three times their original size while baking!
